response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including Java and JVM-related work in past roles, but lacks focused, recent experience with enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — his current work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure, which misaligns with the core technical requirements of the role.
strengths: Demonstrated experience with Java in past roles (e.g., NI LabWindows, RIDE Capital)
Strong track record in developer tooling and open-source contributions (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Excellent communication and teaching skills with workshops on web internals and testing
concerns: No recent or prominent JVM/IDE tooling work in last 4+ years; current focus is TypeScript/Node.js
Lacks explicit experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or application server integration
Resume emphasizes generalist full-stack work rather than deep enterprise Java ecosystem expertise
